interceptor.name: Interceptor
interceptor.desc: Balanced starter. Solid in every role.

tank.name: Tank
tank.desc: Armour plating absorbs flat damage. Slow but nearly unkillable.

glass_cannon.name: Glass Cannon
glass_cannon.desc: Maximum weapon bonus feeds pilot multipliers. Fragile.

scout.name: Scout
scout.desc: Exceptional speed. Dodge everything, rely on positioning.

dreadnought.name: Dreadnought
dreadnought.desc: Maximum weapon slots. Slow. Pilot synergies explode with 6 active weapons.
